Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Dismiss Pursuant To Code Civ. Proc. 418.10 And 583.210, Supporting Declaration, And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Jan-08-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT AMY ANDERSON'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Dismiss Pursuant To Code Civ. Proc. 418.10 And 583.210.

Defendant's unopposed motion to quash service of summons and dismiss pursuant to CCP 418.10 and 583.210 is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
